steps.title: Spot the relationship
steps.content: Sentence 1 says the material was flexible enough for Jordan Ellis's dance moves. Sentence 2 says the rhinestone vines likely limited his mobility. These ideas pull in opposite directions, so the blank needs a contrast signal.

steps.title: Eliminate and confirm
steps.content:
• Choice A — For this reason,: signals that the weight limitation is a result of the material's flexibility — but limited mobility is the opposite of flexibility, not a consequence of it. ✗
  • Choice B — Firstly,: signals the first item in a series — but there is no second item, so no series exists. ✗
  • Choice C — However,: signals a direct contrast — the flexibility of the material is countered by the weight of the rhinestones limiting mobility. ✓
  • Choice D — In other words,: signals a restatement — but Sentence 2 contradicts Sentence 1 rather than rephrasing it. ✗
C is correct.
